title: Inside Trump’s Deal With the I.R.S. to Drop His $10 Billion Lawsuit
summary: Discussions among a group of lawyers with allegiance to the president were closely held. Some senior White House officials were said to have felt blindsided as the agreement took shape.

title: Trump Administration Sees Striking Exodus of Legal Talent
summary: The departure of more than 10,000 federal lawyers has left some agencies without sufficient staff and has boosted the ranks of state attorneys general offices and advocacy groups.

title: Trump Sends Tougher Terms to Iran for Peace Framework, Officials Say
summary: His changes to the proposed deal were potentially designed to speed up the process by putting pressure Iran to accept the current framework, one official said.

title: After Voting Decision, a Month of Political Earthquakes Across the South
summary: Republican officials are jubilant, some voters are confused and concerned, and civil rights activists are gearing up for the fight of a generation.

title: Platner’s Wife Flagged His Sexual Texts With Other Women as Maine Senate Race Began
summary: The wife of Graham Platner, the Democratic candidate in Maine, told the campaign he had sent sexual messages to other women.

title: Senator Dan Sullivan Has a New Challenger in Alaska: Dan Sullivan
summary: Two candidates with the same name will be on the ballot seeking the same seat in the state’s primary. “It’s going to be confusing,” one Republican said.

title: Tilly Norwood, A.I. Actress, Wants to Know Why Everyone’s Mad at Her
summary: The A.I. actress on her craft, the future of film and how she definitely does not intend to murder us.

title: We Have to Take the Future of A.I. Into Our Own Hands
summary: We’ve heard a lot about what it can do for businesses, and for individuals, but what about society?

title: Men and Women Should Be Optimists About Love, Not Heteropessimists
summary: “Heteropessimism” is all the rage — but really, there’s never been a better time to be looking for love. Go on, be a hetero-optimist.

title: Scene Stealer
summary: What happens when a reporter who has interviewed some of the biggest names in Hollywood sits down with the first A.I. actress?

title: Israel Day Parade to Return to New York Against a Changed Backdrop
summary: Mayor Zohran Mamdani does not plan to attend the annual Israel Day Parade, which is taking place amid a deterioration of public support for the country and rising antisemitism across the United States.

title: Who’s the Vegas Retiree With the Big Offer for Greenland?
summary: Clifford E. Stanley, a retired broker, explains his unusual mission, which caught a lot of people by surprise.

title: N.J. Governor Calls for Calm After Protesters Clash With Police at Delaney Hall
summary: Mayor Ras Baraka of Newark imposed a curfew early Sunday around the immigration detention center after a second consecutive night of unrest over living conditions there.

title: Even Havana’s Street Sweepers Can’t Escape the Impact of the Fuel Blockade
summary: A fuel blockade on Cuba has aggravated a lack of consistent garbage pickup and produced enormous trash piles.
